# CTB Agent Governance Scorecard

Use this scorecard for weekly, biweekly, or monthly operating reviews.

## Reporting Period

* `Start date`
* `End date`
* `Prepared by`

## Delivery Speed

* lead time from issue start to merge
* lead time from merge to release
* review turnaround time
* deployment frequency
* top bottleneck state

## Quality and Safety

* escaped defects
* change failure rate
* rollback count
* MTTR
* flaky validation count

## Agent Operating Health

* handoff acceptance rate
* number of stage rework loops
* issues missing required evidence
* scope-drift incidents
* policy-exception requests

## CTB-Specific Operational Health

* simulator failures
* report-generation failures
* notification-delivery failures
* security findings opened
* unresolved high-risk findings

## Key Learnings

* what improved
* what regressed
* which template or policy changes are needed

## Actions

* issue or owner
* action required
* due date
